items.name: Union Square's Free Outdoor Movie Night: 'KPop Demon Hunters' Sing-Along
items.description: A free outdoor movie night featuring a sing-along screening of the KPop Demon Hunters film, with pre-show entertainment and activities starting at 4:00 pm.

items.name: SF Comedy Legends 'The Sklar Brothers' Live at Cobb's Comedy Club
items.description: Join us for a weekend full of nonstop laughs with The Sklar Brothers at Cobb's Comedy Club.  All shows are $34.05 and start at 7:00 pm.

items.name: Golden Gate Comedy Night
items.description: See top comics you'd normally see at Punch Line, Cobbs and SF Sketchfest up close at intimate comedy club in the heart of downtown SF. Looking for a real San Francisco comedy experience? Golden Gate Comedy Night is your go-to show - a sharp, fast-moving showcase of the Bay Area's funniest comedians.
